title: Module 1: Governance & Compliance Evaluation Schema
description: Evaluates AI governance framework, policies, risk management, control documentation, and privacy compliance for AI-based Accounting Information Systems

evaluation_criteria.criterion_name: AI Governance Policy Existence and Completeness
evaluation_criteria.description: Validates existence, completeness, and board approval of comprehensive AI governance policy covering all required sections including privacy governance
evaluation_criteria.check_method: Review AI governance policy document for completeness, board approval signatures, effective dates, and required sections
evaluation_criteria.pass_criteria: Board-approved AI policy exists, updated within 12 months, includes all 7 required sections including privacy governance

evidence_required.approval_requirements: Board of Directors or equivalent governance body signature within 12 months

raci_matrix.description: RACI chart covering all AI systems

compliance_mapping.description: Regulatory requirements mapped (SOX, NIST, ISO, EU AI Act)

board_approval_bonus.description: Additional scoring if board-approved within timeframe

evaluation_criteria.description: Assesses AI risk management system per ISO 42001 Clause 6.1 requirements including risk identification, assessment, treatment, and monitoring
evaluation_criteria.check_method: Review AI risk register, risk assessment procedures, risk monitoring logs, and treatment plans
evaluation_criteria.pass_criteria: AI risk register maintained with minimum 5 documented risks, risk assessment procedure documented, risk monitoring operational, treatment plans for all high risks

evidence_required.approval_requirements: Risk register updated within last quarter, risk assessment procedure approved by CRO or equivalent

thresholds.1.0: ≥10 risks documented covering all 6 categories, all required fields present
thresholds.0.75: 5-9 risks documented, most required fields present
thresholds.0.5: 5 risks documented but incomplete fields or missing categories

thresholds.1.0: Comprehensive procedure documented, approved, tested within 12 months
thresholds.0.75: Procedure documented and approved, not recently tested
thresholds.0.5: Procedure exists but incomplete or not approved

thresholds.1.0: Automated risk monitoring operational, quarterly reviews documented, escalation procedures tested
thresholds.0.75: Manual monitoring operational, quarterly reviews documented
thresholds.0.5: Ad-hoc monitoring only, some documentation gaps

thresholds.1.0: Treatment plans documented for all high/critical risks, implementation tracked
thresholds.0.75: Treatment plans exist for most high risks
thresholds.0.5: Treatment plans incomplete or not tracked

evaluation_criteria.description: Validates SOX 404-compliant documentation of AI-related internal controls including control design, testing, and COSO component mapping
evaluation_criteria.check_method: Review control matrix, control testing documentation, COSO framework mapping, and exception tracking
evaluation_criteria.pass_criteria: Minimum 10 AI controls documented, control testing completed per SOX 404 frequency requirements, COSO component mapping complete, exceptions documented and remediated

evidence_required.approval_requirements: Control matrix approved by CFO or Controller, testing completed within required SOX 404 frequency

thresholds.1.0: ≥15 controls documented with all required fields, control narratives comprehensive
thresholds.0.75: 10-14 controls documented, all required fields present
thresholds.0.5: 10 controls documented but some fields incomplete

thresholds.1.0: All controls tested per SOX 404 frequency (quarterly for key controls, annually for others), sample sizes meet AICPA standards
thresholds.0.75: Most controls tested, minor frequency gaps
thresholds.0.5: Testing incomplete or sample sizes inadequate
thresholds.0.0: Controls not tested or testing >12 months old

thresholds.1.0: All controls mapped to COSO components, coverage across all 5 components
thresholds.0.75: Most controls mapped, coverage across 4-5 components
thresholds.0.5: Partial mapping or gaps in COSO coverage

thresholds.1.0: All exceptions documented, remediation complete or in-progress with timeline, management responses documented
thresholds.0.75: Exceptions documented, most remediated
thresholds.0.5: Exceptions identified but remediation delayed or incomplete
thresholds.0.0: Exceptions not tracked or no remediation

evaluation_criteria.description: Validates completeness and currency of AI system inventory including all production AI systems, risk classifications, and ownership
evaluation_criteria.check_method: Review AI system inventory for completeness, accuracy, currency, and required metadata
evaluation_criteria.pass_criteria: All production AI systems documented, inventory updated within last quarter, risk classifications assigned, system owners identified

evidence_required.approval_requirements: Inventory reviewed and approved quarterly by AI Governance Lead

thresholds.1.0: All AI systems in financial processes documented with all required fields
thresholds.0.75: All systems documented, minor field gaps
thresholds.0.5: Most systems documented but some missing or incomplete

thresholds.1.0: Updated within last month
thresholds.0.75: Updated within last quarter

thresholds.1.0: All systems have risk classification (High/Medium/Low) with justification
thresholds.0.75: All systems classified, some justifications missing

thresholds.1.0: All systems have assigned owner with contact information
thresholds.0.75: All systems have owner, some contact info missing

evaluation_criteria.description: Assesses AI-related training programs for relevant personnel including AI system owners, finance team, and auditors
evaluation_criteria.check_method: Review training attendance records, training content, assessment scores, and coverage analysis
evaluation_criteria.pass_criteria: ≥80% of required personnel trained, training covers AI risk management fundamentals, assessment pass rate ≥85%, training completed within 12 months

evidence_required.approval_requirements: Training program approved by HR and AI Governance Lead

thresholds.1.0: ≥95% required personnel trained
thresholds.0.75: 80-94% required personnel trained

thresholds.1.0: Comprehensive training covering AI risks, ethics, governance, controls, privacy
thresholds.0.75: Training covers most topics

thresholds.1.0: ≥90% pass rate, remedial training for failures
thresholds.0.75: 85-89% pass rate

thresholds.1.0: Training within last 6 months
thresholds.0.75: Training within last 12 months

evaluation_criteria.description: Validates maintenance of Record of Processing Activities (ROPA) per GDPR Article 30 for AI systems processing personal data
evaluation_criteria.check_method: Review ROPA documentation for completeness, accuracy, currency, and GDPR Article 30 compliance
evaluation_criteria.pass_criteria: ROPA maintained covering all AI data processing activities, updated within 12 months, includes all Article 30 required fields, DPO reviewed where applicable

evidence_required.approval_requirements: ROPA reviewed by DPO or legal counsel within 12 months
evidence_required.applicability: Required if processing personal data of EU residents

thresholds.1.0: All AI processing activities documented with all Article 30 required fields
thresholds.0.75: All activities documented, minor field gaps
thresholds.0.5: Most activities documented but significant gaps

thresholds.1.0: Updated within last 6 months
thresholds.0.75: Updated within last 12 months

thresholds.1.0: Legal basis clearly documented for all processing activities with justification
thresholds.0.75: Legal basis documented, some justifications incomplete

thresholds.1.0: DPO review documented within 12 months (if DPO required)
thresholds.0.75: DPO review within 18 months or legal counsel review if no DPO

geographic_exemption.description: If organization does not process EU resident data, criterion scored as N/A
geographic_exemption.exemption_documentation_required: Legal opinion or geographic scope documentation

evaluation_criteria.description: Validates governance oversight of Data Protection Impact Assessments (DPIAs) for high-risk AI processing per GDPR Article 35
evaluation_criteria.check_method: Review DPIA governance procedures, DPO consultation records, board/committee oversight documentation
evaluation_criteria.pass_criteria: DPIA governance procedures documented, DPO consulted for all high-risk AI DPIAs, governance committee reviews DPIAs for high-risk systems, remediation tracking for DPIA findings

evidence_required.approval_requirements: DPIA governance procedure approved by legal/DPO, committee minutes show DPIA reviews
evidence_required.applicability: Required if processing personal data of EU residents with high-risk AI systems

thresholds.1.0: Comprehensive DPIA procedure with clear triggers, methodology, DPO consultation requirement, approved within 12 months
thresholds.0.75: Procedure documented and approved, minor gaps

thresholds.1.0: DPO consulted for all high-risk AI DPIAs, recommendations documented and tracked
thresholds.0.75: DPO consulted for most DPIAs, some gaps

thresholds.1.0: Governance committee (Board, Ethics Committee, or AI Governance Committee) reviews all high-risk AI DPIAs, minutes document review
thresholds.0.75: Committee reviews most DPIAs

thresholds.1.0: DPIA findings tracked, remediation plans documented, implementation monitored
thresholds.0.75: Findings tracked, some remediation gaps

geographic_exemption.description: If no high-risk AI processing of EU resident data, criterion scored as N/A
geographic_exemption.exemption_documentation_required: Risk assessment showing no high-risk AI or geographic scope documentation

severity_mapping.score_0.0_to_0.5: Material Weakness (if GDPR applicable to high-risk AI)
severity_mapping.score_NA: Not Applicable (no high-risk AI processing EU data, documented)

aggregate_scoring.calculation: sum(criterion_score × weight), excluding N/A criteria and renormalizing weights
aggregate_scoring.note: Privacy governance criteria (G1.6, G1.7) scored N/A if GDPR not applicable; weights renormalized across applicable criteria

iso_42001.clause_5_2: G1.1 - Top management commitment and policy

gdpr.articles_37_39: G1.7 - Data Protection Officer where applicable

ccpa.section_1798_100: G1.6 - Right to know what data collected
ccpa.section_1798_130: G1.1 - Business security and privacy policy obligations

interdependency_triggers.action: Escalate fairness testing from standard 10% sample to comprehensive 50% sample
interdependency_triggers.rationale: Missing or inadequate governance policy, especially lack of bias detection procedures, indicates higher risk of undetected systematic bias

interdependency_triggers.action: Escalate Module 3 privacy criteria (S3.4-S3.6) to comprehensive testing, flag privacy governance gap
interdependency_triggers.rationale: Privacy governance weaknesses at policy level indicate higher risk of privacy control failures at technical level

council_of_experts_integration.stage_1_domain_score: Aggregate score from G1.1-G1.7 using weighted average

stage_2_peer_review_lens.review_by_m2_fairness: Does governance framework mandate bias detection? Are fairness accountability owners assigned?
stage_2_peer_review_lens.review_by_m3_security: Does governance framework mandate security/privacy standards? Are DPO responsibilities clear?
stage_2_peer_review_lens.review_by_m4_explainability: Does governance mandate explainability standards? Is audit trail governance adequate?
stage_2_peer_review_lens.review_by_m5_accuracy: Is model performance monitoring mandated? Who is accountable for drift alerts?

council_of_experts_integration.stage_3_arbitrator_inputs: M1 domain score + 4 peer review cards + governance trigger log
